title: Sanger Sequencing
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"cs5o","text":"This protocols is part of the Screening Edited iPSC Clones collection. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":30,"length":39}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"BEBD27F0340111E9A58D6132AAED8016","url":"https://www.protocols.io/view/untitled-collection-yazfsf6/protocols"}}}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"98hm7","text":"After identifying iPSC clones with the appropriate banding pattern, gDNA from iPSC clones of interest should be sequenced in order to confirm genotype. To do this, set up a sequencing reaction as outlined below.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6osau","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"af7sh","text":"Perform PCR on gDNA using the following TouchDown Protocol (50μL reaction). The PCR amplicon size should be between 300-400 bp. The primers used for the RFLP screening can also be used for Sanger Sequencing.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"3daio","text":"Please refer to the SDS (Safety Data Sheet) for information about hazards, and to obtain advice on safety precautions.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Set up PCR on ice, add reagents in desired order (however it is best to add the polymerase and gDNA last). %s %s %s %s
Run 15 µL of each sample on a 2% gel to determine presence of PCR product.
Run product on gel at 150 V for 01:30:00 .
After confirming the presence of PCR product, move on to sequencing reaction protocol below: %s %s Send out a Forward and a Reverse for each sample.
creator: Celeste M M. Karch
